name: Centric Holdings S.A.
summary: Centric Holdings S.A. provides on-board entertainment services on vessels, hotels, and yachts. It also offers mass catering and tourist accommodation services, as well as technology services at sea. In addition, the company engages in renewable energy and commercial real estate business. Centric Holdings S.A. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Moschato, Greece.
